templates.title: Day 1 Participation Rubric
templates.description: Faculty observation of engagement across squad activities and builder completion. Evidence for competency tracking — not a graded exam.

criteria.label: Squad engagement
indicators: Contributes actively in dream board and charter activities
Listens and builds on squad mates' ideas
Shows up prepared for squad formation

criteria.label: Builder completion
indicators: Completes ambition, impact, and values builders
Submits future self narrative with personal detail
Explores career direction with honest reflection

criteria.label: Incubator mindset
indicators: Uses venture builder language vs employee language
Connects activities to portfolio and business plan outputs
Asks questions about entrepreneurship path

criteria.label: Professional presence
indicators: Participates in gallery walk and debriefs
Communicates clearly in dyad and squad settings
Accepts coaching feedback without defensiveness

templates.title: Venture Identity Readiness Rubric
templates.description: Assesses quality of Day 1 identity outputs — ambition, impact, values, future self — for Hour 200 readiness trajectory.

criteria.label: Ambition clarity
indicators: Names a specific role or outcome
Uses personal language, not copied phrases
Connects to entrepreneurship, not employment

criteria.label: Impact specificity
indicators: Identifies a target audience
Describes a transformation or outcome for that audience
Links to protection or financial planning context

criteria.label: Values integrity
indicators: Ranks top three values with reasoning
Values align with stated ambition
Can articulate a non-negotiable

criteria.label: Future self narrative
indicators: Written in present tense, 3-year horizon
Includes professional and personal dimensions
Feels aspirational yet believable

templates.title: Faculty Day 1 Observation Form
templates.description: Quick-scan observation during Deck 01/02 delivery and builder activities. Complete one row per participant.

templates.title: Mentor Day 1 Identity Observation
templates.description: Mentor observation during squad activities and first coaching check-in. Feeds Week 1 coaching summary.

templates.title: Mentor Day 1 Debrief Reflection
templates.description: Mentor completes after Day 1 squad sessions. Informs Day 2 coaching plan.
prompts: Which participant needs the most follow-up before Day 2?
What identity gap did you observe most often today?
What coaching question worked best in your squad?
What will you watch for during Day 2 industry immersion?
